# PLANTED TEST SECRET — FIXTURE ONLY.
#
# This is NOT a real credential. It is a deliberately-fake, clearly-labelled
# high-entropy string used to PROVE the CI secret scanner fires on a planted
# secret from the repository's first CI run (Story 1.3 AC2). It lives ONLY under
# tests/fixtures/leak-fixtures/ and matches the folio-test-planted-secret rule
# in .gitleaks.toml. The production CI scan excludes this directory; a dedicated
# fixture-scan step (and the vitest proof) exercises it.
#
# DO NOT replace this with a real secret. If you need to rotate the pattern,
# update .gitleaks.toml's regex AND tests/ci.test.ts together.

# The planted secret — matches: TEST-FIXTURE-SECRET-[A-Za-z0-9/+=]{32,}
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY = TEST-FIXTURE-SECRET-wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
